The '''third moon''' of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Storm (planet)|Storm]] was located in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]],<ref name="SoN" /> a part of the [[Chommell sector/Legends|Chommell sector]] in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Along with the rest of its [[Star system/Legends|star system]], it was situated along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]]<ref name="TEA" /> as well as the [[Old Trade Federation Route/Legends|Old Trade Federation Route]].<ref name="SWG" /> The [[Moon/Legends|moon]] housed a [[Prison/Legends|penal colony]] used by the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|inhabitants]] of the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="SoN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The moon was first mentioned by ''[[Secrets of Naboo]]'', a [[2001]] sourcebook for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="SoN" /> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the moons of the planet Storm in grid square O-17.<ref name="TEA" />
